articles.title: Dfinity’s new API boosts Internet Computer smart contracts with cross-chain prowess
articles.description: Dfinity Foundation has introduced a new API called EVM RPC to enhance cross-chain interoperability for Internet Computer (ICP) smart contracts, according to a May 23 press statement shared with CryptoSlate. EVM RPC allows ICP smart contracts to read and write on any Ethereum Virtual Machine-compatible chain, such as Optimism, Arbitrum, and Base, without relying on […]

articles.title: SEC Interest in Ethereum ETFs Came from Nowhere, Or Did It?
articles.description: What prompted the SEC to break its silence and approve Ethereum ETF proposals?

articles.title: Breaking News! Ethereum ETFs Approved By US SEC
articles.description: The US Securities and Exchange Commission said it has approved the launch of spot Ethereum ETFs for accelerated launch, according to a document uploaded to the agencys website. Ethereum ETFs face a weeks-long process of finalizing S-1 registration statements, a form required by the SEC for ETFs to list securities, and establishing exchange agreements through multiple rounds of SEC...

articles.title: The SEC has approved eight spot Ether ETFs in a landmark decision
articles.description: The United States Securities and Exchange Commission has approved eight spot Ether exchange-traded funds (ETFs) in the country. In a landmark decision on Thursday evening, the financial watchdog approved 19b-4 forms for the ETFs from BlackRock, Fidelity, Grayscale, Bitwise, VanEck, Ark, Invesco Galaxy, and Franklin… Read more...

articles.title: Ethereum ETF Proposals Clear Key SEC Hurdle in Sudden Crypto Turnaround
articles.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission appears ready to pass eight spot Ethereum ETFs after expectations on their approval flipped overnight. The agency just approved form 19b-4 filings from BlackRock, Fidelity, VanEck, Grayscale, Bitwise, Ark, Franklin Templeton and Invesco Galaxy simultaneously. Although the products have nearly obtained the full go-ahead, the SEC must approve the...

articles.title: Ethereum ETFs Approved in Abrupt SEC Policy About-Face
articles.description: Spot Ethereum ETFs will be traded in the United States, just months after spot Bitcoin ETFs received their own approval from the SEC.

articles.title: Spot Ether ETFs receive official approval from the SEC
articles.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission gave the green light to several spot Ether ETFs after speculation that the regulator was considering treating ETH as a security.

articles.title: U.S. Securities Regulator Approves Spot Ether ETFs in Landmark Decision
articles.description: The SEC has issued an omnibus approval for ETH ETF applicants.

articles.title: SEC Approves the Ethereum ETFs
articles.description: The Securities and Exchanges Commission (SEC) has approved the ethereum ETFs.

articles.title: Algorand Pokes Ethereum and Solana In Anthony Scaramucci Featured Ad
articles.description: The Algorand Layer-1 blockchain has released an advert that slammed Ethereum (ETH) and Solana (SOL) for their high cost and slow speed. The advert pitches Algorand as a better alternative with speed, low cost, and efficiency. articles.title: US Lawmakers pressure SEC for Ethereum ETF approval
articles.description: A bipartisan group of US lawmakers sent a letter to the SEC urging the approval of spot Ethereum exchange-traded funds (ETFs), as reported by Politico. The group consists of five members of the House Financial Services Committee, two Republicans and three Democrats, and is led by Rep. articles.description: SNEK, largest meme coin of Cardano, has surged over 20% this week, fueled by meme mania and potential for major exchange listings

articles.title: Ethereum Rises Ahead of ETF Decision
articles.description: Ethereum crossed $3,900, touching $3,920 as of writing, ahead of the expected spot ETF decision later today.

articles.description: Holders cumulatively bought over 100,000 ETH in spot markets on Tuesday, the highest daily level since September 2023.

articles.title: Hong Kong Sees Record Inflows for Ethereum ETFs
articles.description: Ethereum ETFs in Hong Kong hit record inflows, while Bitcoin ETFs continue to perform strongly, as investors speculate on potential US SEC approvals.
